g.text: Established visual characteristics and fundamental classification logic.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-weight: 700; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Lato', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #1b7b8a

g.text: Shifted focus from static morphology to active metabolic phenotypes.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-weight: 700; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Lato', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: end; fill: #2d8c5a

g.text: Replaced phenotypic approximation with exact genotypic ID; unlocked unculturable taxa.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-weight: 700; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Lato', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #c87a20

font-style: italic; font-size: 7px; font-family: 'Lato', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #555555

g.text: Moved from single-gene identification to single-base, strain-level genomic resolution.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-weight: 700; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'Lato', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: end; fill: #2155a0

g.text: Transitioned from human-led sequence analysis to AI-driven pattern recognition.

g.text: Recontextualized time-series growth data (OD curves) as high-dimensional, predictive datasets.
